description: Evaluate DSPy as an optional typed program optimization layer for legal extraction, retrieval-grounded annotation, and model evaluation without replacing deterministic rule paths.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 57 DSPy evaluation is archived: three signatures, one deterministic optimizer experiment, source anchors, review metadata, a rejected required-dependency decision, and rollback guidance are present. The live evaluation harness and docs provide the evidence needed for review and archive closeout.
